ddt:Target.Name: 4RD CMF1 4.0
ddt:Target.Description:
C. LEBEAU - 65514 - UET Steering System tel : +331 768 76017 DDT Base V4.0 - For 4WS SW >= 5.7
V4.0 : SW reference low part change Screen update V3.3 : Correction of DID calculation rules Compatibility added with XFB and XFD V3.2 : Correction of the DataWrite.TuningParameter Request V3.1 : Officialization for SW 5.6 V3.0 : New screens for tuning V2.5 : Modification of the tuning size to be compliant with 5.6 V2.2 : Correction of the Inhibition Screens. Development screens added. Correction of the standard requests V2.1 : Update of the screens V2.0 : Modification to be compliant with SW-C V1.5 : Correction of Auto-identification data V1.4 : Add $211A Update of the screens Correction of the format of the values displayed V1.3 : update of the screens V1.2 : update of the DTC V1.1 : update of the screens V1.0 : Based on X91 4WS V4.3 DDT base Modifications of the DID and requests to be used for CMF1

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
motor or driver or current sensor
MainMPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Servo MPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)
Absolute Sensor Data (wires or sensor or acquisition)
ECU internal relay stuck close or phase wire open (2 or 3 wires)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: data absent since wake up of 4WS
Only faults reports and alerts that must remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
all faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
all faults reports and alerts are enabled

Data.Name: Speed of actuator for oscillation routine

Item.Text: control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
control aborted due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)

Data.Name: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)

Item.Text: Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to vehicle speed > 0km/h
Routine completed and Nok : stopped due to failure
routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)
Routine completed and Nok : RAZ stopped due to internal fault
Routine completed and NOK : routine stopped due to diag tool unplugged (session C0 stopped)
Control aborted due to vehicle speed > 0km/h (12h)
Control aborted due to tool unplugged (session C0 stopped) (14h)

Data.Name: Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)
Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Long List)
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Gradient failure flag

Item.Text: no vehicle speed gradient failure detected

Data.Name: Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Clock failure flag

Item.Text: no vehicle speed clock failure detected

Data.Name: Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Checksum failure flag

Item.Text: no vehicle speed checksum failure detected

Data.Name: Brake Status.Vehicle Speed sign failure flag

Item.Text: no vehicle speed sign failure detected

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

DataItem.Name: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)
Speed of actuator for oscillation routine
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Gradient failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed sign failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Clock failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Checksum failure flag

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

DataItem.Name: Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)
Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Long List)

Request.Name: RDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Servo MPU Failure (Plausibility error /ROM / RAM / pulse / DMA)

Label.Text: Valeurs des paramètres à ecrire en mémoire

Send.RequestName: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Input.RequestName: WDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Display.RequestName: RDBLId - System Inhibition Flags Parameters Set

Display.DataName: Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Gradient failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed sign failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Checksum failure flag
Brake Status.Vehicle Speed Clock failure flag

Label.Text: A = Janv, B = Fev , C = March
D = April, E = May , F = June
G = July, H = Aug , I = Sept
J = Oct, K = Nov , L = Dec
Avant de lancer la routine (bouton start), il faut placer le véhicule sur un pont roues arrières pendantes

Input.DataName: Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)
Speed of actuator for oscillation routine
Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Short List)

Label.Text: Reset ECU permet : prise en compte d'une calibration ou réactivation du diagnostic après un clear diag
Le reset calculateur ne s'effectuera qu'à vitesse nulle :

Screen.Name: Read/ Write - Tuning/VIN - Scenario error - Scenario error

Label.Text: Valeurs des paramètres à ecrire en mémoire (Vitesse <2km/h!)
